description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a dark, multi-faceted hip roof and a white exterior accented by gray window shutters and trim. The front features a covered porch with columns, a small set of steps, and a prominent entryway, while the side reveals a wooden garage door and a driveway leading to a parked car. The backyard is enclosed by a wooden fence and includes a pergola-covered patio, outdoor seating, and mature trees providing shade. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with a mix of single and double-hung styles. The house is surrounded by a well-maintained lawn and landscaping, with paved walkways and a driveway connecting to the street. Architectural details such as the gabled porch roof, decorative trim, and multi-pane windows evoke a blend of Colonial and Craftsman influences.
description: A two-story white house with a dark hip roof, covered porch, garage, fenced yard, and landscaped garden, blending Colonial and Craftsman styles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, steps, and driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and partial view of the backyard patio and fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, pergola-covered patio, outdoor seating, and mature trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, additional windows, and the rear entryway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of single and double-hung windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, steps, decorative trim, and a prominent front door
